trans-unit.source: Scaffold a new aspire-template.json manifest in the current or specified directory
trans-unit.target: Scaffold a new aspire-template.json manifest in the current or specified directory

trans-unit.source: Path to the directory where the manifest should be created. Defaults to the current directory.
trans-unit.target: Path to the directory where the manifest should be created. Defaults to the current directory.

trans-unit.source: The 'aspire template {0}' command is not yet implemented.
trans-unit.target: The 'aspire template {0}' command is not yet implemented.

trans-unit.source: Force refresh of the template cache
trans-unit.target: Force refresh of the template cache

trans-unit.source: Keyword to search for in template names, descriptions, and tags
trans-unit.target: Keyword to search for in template names, descriptions, and tags
